entry.title: Correspondence: Open Item List in Public Cloud PDF Preview in Monitor Email Transmission
entry.content:
Dear All,

when creating in App Schedule Accounts Receivable Jobs a run Correspondence: Open Item List while the output is maintained as E-Mail I can´t see an PDF preview of the open item list in App Monitor Email Transmission.

Any idea how to get for the run an PDF preview. It is working for an single output in App Create Correspondence however this is not what i am asking for.

Many thanks

Sebastian

entry.title: Re: RFQ form doesn't provide the required fields for item and header notes (texts) ?
entry.content: Hi How did you fix this issue? I am also looking for Data source for Header and Item Text in RFQ.

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC Access Control – Access Request – User provisioning at item level
entry.content:
Hello Louty, I was thinking about same solution because of similar issues with absent or already left approvers few years ago when we were on GRC AC 10.0.

Based on investigation and mainly after upgrade to GRC AC 12.0 I realised that is easier to split request for roles approved by more GRC Role Approvers to more GRC AC requests - to create GRC AC request containing jobroles to be approved only by one GRC Role Approver. It's simple in GRC AC 12.0 because you can use Role Import functionality and Copy Request functionality. An effort spent on the creation more GRC AC requests on beginning is less than later to remind again and again pending GRC Role Approver/s or to proceed temporary switch of main GRC Role Approver and Alternate one (as deputy) and then back. I don't if it is common but even if is information about Delegation widely known, is used rarely. And yes, can be complicated to define Delegation if one GRC Role Approver has more deputies due more different jobroles.

As it is used on daily basis by our 1st level support and users appreciate fast solving their role requests, I can say it's fine working solution.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: Create SAP S/4HANA External GL Account Hierarchy within SAP Datasphere using standard CDS Views
entry.content: @aalbis glad it works. In my experience, just (re)deploying the Analytic Model deploys all other views and should be enough.

entry.title: Re: Do we have a certificate for datasphere? thanks ~
entry.content: For me, I have just switched to working with SAP Datasphere skills without any prior basic knowledge of BW4. Therefore, I would like SAP to open up more opportunities. I see that SAP SuccessFactors has multiple certifications separated by topics. I believe it is neither strange nor difficult to add an SAP Datasphere certification, especially for SAP Data Engineer.

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC 12.0 Access Control and Microsoft Entra ID Co...
entry.content:
Hello Yatin

Entra ID lead SSO is focussed on "browser based" services e.g. Fiori Launchpad, services in SICF etc. and tutorial below advises how to onboard SAP Netweaver / Fiori Launchpad / S/4HANA. Assuming your GRC 12.0 system is on-premise and only available within corporate VPN - the SSO will only work when users are accessing from within VPN - unless GRC 12.0 system is available from the Cloud.

Tutorial: Microsoft Entra single sign-on (SSO) integration with SAP NetWeaver - Microsoft Entra ID | Microsoft Learn

Tutorial: Microsoft Entra single sign-on (SSO) integration with SAP HANA - Microsoft Entra ID | Microsoft Learn

Tutorial: Microsoft Entra single sign-on (SSO) integration with SAP Fiori - Microsoft Entra ID | Microsoft Learn

Alternatively use SAP Cloud Identity Services to managed SSO to SAP applications and delegate SSO to MS Entra ID as corporate IDP:

Create a New Application | SAP Help Portal

For a more complete solution with the ability to SSO to SAP GUI for Windows too - consider "SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI" too that is the successor tool to SAP SSO 3.0. This service uses SAP Cloud Identity Services to initiate SSO to on-premise SAP systems configured in SAP GUI for Windows.

Mike Healey

 

Kind regards

Mike

entry.title: Re: SCIM User Deployment to IBP System, Role assignment via SAML token possible?
entry.content:
Hi Bastian,

guess there are 2 topics to this idea...


The first is, who is issuing the saml2 token and does that instance know the groups, and if the amount of groups would potentially exceed the maximum SAML2 request size... cause I ran into that a couple years ago so there are limits to that...


Second would be if IBP has a feature to map roles to SAML2 attributes, like it is possible for example with the BTP CF and OIDC...
Didn't find any documentation on IBP side therefor so i guess it would most likely end up to be a feature request...

regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: SAP PI transport issue
entry.content: Thanks, that worked for me - SE24, Searched for my class and then directly activate - it showed me the inactive Objects and activate them

entry.title: How to import Material Master using mediated connectivity using external middleware
entry.content:
Hi,

How to import Material Master to Ariba sourcing using external middleware. Kindly share the details of the Files ,File formats to be imported to Ariba and how it needs to be send to Ariba. Any reference link would be helpful.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Deploy the UI5 Fiori app on SAP ABAP repository with BAS & WEBIDE, create Fiori app Tile using L
entry.content:
Hi!
Could you please explain a little bit? 

in case i need some changes in Controller or View files on BAS side. Should I redeploy everything again? 

BR Dmitrii

entry.title: Re: Setting Up the Crossboarding Process with SAP SuccessFactors Recruitment Management
entry.content:
Hello,

We implemented SuccessFactors Recruiting and Onboarding about a year ago. We were told only "Transfer" event can be sent from RCM to EC. Is that still the case?

We are using the event and event reason picklist from EC but had to remove all except "Transfer".  We consider it a "Promotion" if an associate is selected for a position in which they advance pay grades/career levels. Any advice on how we can maintain the reason for movement from RCM to EC?  

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Popup Notification while using FFID & Notification to...
entry.content:
Hello Sankar, I would like to ask - why so complicated process? By my experience, more people involved in the cascade bring more troubles and delays. Maybe is GRC understood as crucial SAP system by business in your company so they prioritise any GRC related request. But it would be rare, I guess.

From my point of view is the most critical and important the phase "request for an access to FFID". Because if approved, Firefighter will get powerful access rights in SAP Production system and even if are changes logged, once done, no simple way back.

That's why I prefer the prevention - to be careful at beginning by approving the access to FFID. FF Owner has to be sure whom to allow, also because of responsibility for.

Technical steps like to activate logon notification or reminder for pending FF Log Reviews (especially if there is no choice to reject as is possible for role assignment) cannot cover wrong decision done by FF Owner.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Completion Indicator CHECKED generates WOs even without previous WOs completed
entry.content:
Hi All.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? We have 31 exactly same maintenance plans. They are scheduled and have already generated some calls. All of a sudden, plan number 27 and 28 have started work orders without the previous orders being completed. The following are the details of the MPs:

- Cycle/Unit = 5 days

- Offset = 0 day

- Shift Factor for Late Completion = 100%, Tolerance (+) = 0%

- Shift Factor for Early Completion = 100%, Tolerance (-) = 0%

- Cycle Modification Factor = 1.00

- Call Horizon = 5 days

- Scheduling Period = 365 days

- Completion Requirement = CHECKED

- Scheduling Indicator = Time

entry.title: Re: SAP 分析云 2024 年第四季度更新介绍
entry.content: hi William 感谢介绍，有客户反馈SAC的office 365 add-in版本会定期更新，他们需要手工操作插件升级，所以需要提前知道升级时间，请问这个add-in的版本更新是包含在SAC每季度的版本更新里吗？

entry.title: Re: Actual Rate Calculation - Event Based Posting
entry.content: Getting Warning msg KV165, no target costs in target cost version - missing plan for activity

entry.title: I am facing an issue with running the build mta file
entry.content:
Anyone please help me with this error

npm ERR! A complete log of this run can be found in: /home/user/.npm/_logs/2024-11-22T11_21_22_784Z-debug-0.log
[2024-11-22 11:21:22] ERROR could not build the "PostgreSQLdemobrowse" module: could not execute the "npm ci" command: exit status 1
make: *** [Makefile_20241122112105.mta:37: PostgreSQLdemobrowse] Error 1
Error: could not build the MTA project: could not execute the "make -f Makefile_20241122112105.mta p=cf mtar= strict=true mode=" command: exit status 2

Here is the log files

0 verbose cli /local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/bin/node /home/user/.asdf-inst/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/bin/npm
1 info using npm@10.5.0
2 info using node@v20.12.0
3 timing npm:load:whichnode Completed in 1ms
4 timing config:load:defaults Completed in 1ms
5 timing config:load:file:/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/npmrc Completed in 1ms
6 timing config:load:builtin Completed in 1ms
7 timing config:load:cli Completed in 1ms
8 timing config:load:env Completed in 1ms
9 timing config:load:file:/home/user/projects/PostgreSQLdemo/app/browse/.npmrc Completed in 0ms
10 timing config:load:project Completed in 3ms
11 timing config:load:file:/home/user/.npmrc Completed in 1ms
12 timing config:load:user Completed in 1ms
13 timing config:load:file:/home/user/.node_modules_global/etc/npmrc Completed in 0ms
14 timing config:load:global Completed in 0ms
15 timing config:load:setEnvs Completed in 0ms
16 timing config:load Completed in 8ms
17 timing npm:load:configload Completed in 8ms
18 timing config:load:flatten Completed in 1ms
19 timing npm:load:mkdirpcache Completed in 0ms
20 timing npm:load:mkdirplogs Completed in 0ms
21 verbose title npm ci
22 verbose argv "ci"
23 timing npm:load:setTitle Completed in 0ms
24 timing npm:load:display Completed in 0ms
25 verbose logfile logs-max:10 dir:/home/user/.npm/_logs/2024-11-22T11_21_22_784Z-
26 verbose logfile /home/user/.npm/_logs/2024-11-22T11_21_22_784Z-debug-0.log
27 timing npm:load:logFile Completed in 5ms
28 timing npm:load:timers Completed in 0ms
29 timing npm:load:configScope Completed in 0ms
30 timing npm:load Completed in 25ms
31 timing arborist:ctor Completed in 1ms
32 verbose loadVirtual Error: loadVirtual requires existing shrinkwrap file
32 verbose loadVirtual     at Arborist.loadVirtual (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/@npmcli/arborist/lib/arborist/load-virtual.js:51:18)
32 verbose loadVirtual     at async CI.exec (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/commands/ci.js:48:5)
32 verbose loadVirtual     at async module.exports (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/cli-entry.js:61:5)
33 timing command:ci Completed in 3ms
34 verbose stack Error: 
34 verbose stack The `npm ci` command can only install with an existing package-lock.json or
34 verbose stack npm-shrinkwrap.json with lockfileVersion >= 1. Run an install with npm@5 or
34 verbose stack later to generate a package-lock.json file, then try again.
34 verbose stack
34 verbose stack Clean install a project
34 verbose stack
34 verbose stack Usage:
34 verbose stack npm ci
34 verbose stack
34 verbose stack Options:
34 verbose stack [--install-strategy <hoisted|nested|shallow|linked>] [--legacy-bundling]
34 verbose stack [--global-style] [--omit <dev|optional|peer> [--omit <dev|optional|peer> ...]]
34 verbose stack [--include <prod|dev|optional|peer> [--include <prod|dev|optional|peer> ...]]
34 verbose stack [--strict-peer-deps] [--foreground-scripts] [--ignore-scripts] [--no-audit]

34 verbose stack [-w|--workspace <workspace-name> [-w|--workspace <workspace-name> ...]]
34 verbose stack [-ws|--workspaces] [--include-workspace-root] [--install-links]
34 verbose stack
34 verbose stack aliases: clean-install, ic, install-clean, isntall-clean
34 verbose stack
34 verbose stack Run "npm help ci" for more info
34 verbose stack     at CI.usageError (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/base-command.js:114:26)
34 verbose stack     at /local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/commands/ci.js:54:18
34 verbose stack     at async CI.exec (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/commands/ci.js:48:5)
34 verbose stack     at async module.exports (/local/asdf-inst-inbox-runtime/installs/nodejs/20.12.0/lib/node_modules/npm/lib/cli-entry.js:61:5)
35 verbose cwd /home/user/projects/PostgreSQLdemo/app/browse
36 verbose Linux 6.1.95-gardenlinux-cloud-amd64
37 verbose node v20.12.0
38 verbose npm  v10.5.0
39 error code EUSAGE
40 error
40 error The `npm ci` command can only install with an existing package-lock.json or
40 error npm-shrinkwrap.json with lockfileVersion >= 1. Run an install with npm@5 or
40 error later to generate a package-lock.json file, then try again.
40 error
40 error Clean install a project
40 error
40 error Usage:
40 error npm ci
40 error
40 error Options:
40 error [--install-strategy <hoisted|nested|shallow|linked>] [--legacy-bundling]
40 error [--global-style] [--omit <dev|optional|peer> [--omit <dev|optional|peer> ...]]
40 error [--include <prod|dev|optional|peer> [--include <prod|dev|optional|peer> ...]]
40 error [--strict-peer-deps] [--foreground-scripts] [--ignore-scripts] [--no-audit]
40 error [--no-bin-links] [--no-fund] [--dry-run]
40 error [-w|--workspace <workspace-name> [-w|--workspace <workspace-name> ...]]
40 error [-ws|--workspaces] [--include-workspace-root] [--install-links]
40 error
40 error aliases: clean-install, ic, install-clean, isntall-clean
40 error
40 error Run "npm help ci" for more info
41 verbose exit 1
42 timing npm Completed in 141ms
43 verbose code 1
44 error A complete log of this run can be found in: /home/user/.npm/_logs/2024-11-22T11_21_22_784Z-debug-0.log

Here is the mta.yaml code

_schema-version: 3.3.0
ID: PostgreSQLdemo
version: 1.0.0
description: "A simple CAP project."
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true
  deploy_mode: html5-repo
build-parameters:
  before-all:
    - builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npx cds build --production
modules:
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-srv
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      readiness-health-check-type: http
      readiness-health-check-http-endpoint: /health
    build-parameters:
      builder: npm
    provides:
      - name: srv-api # required by consumers of CAP services (e.g. approuter)
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}
    requires:
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-auth
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-postgres
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-messaging
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-connectivity
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-destination

  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-postgres-deployer
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/pg
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      no-route: true
      no-start: true
      tasks:
        - name: deploy-to-postgresql
          command: npm start
    requires:
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-postgres

  - name: PostgreSQLdemo
    type: approuter.nodejs
    path: app/router
    parameters:
      keep-existing-routes: true
      disk-quota: 256M
      memory: 256M
    requires:
      - name: srv-api
        group: destinations
        properties:
          name: srv-api # must be used in xs-app.json as well
          url: ~{srv-url}
          forwardAuthToken: true
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-auth
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-destination
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-html5-runtime
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-portal

  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-app-deployer
    type: com.sap.application.content
    path: gen
    requires:
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-html5-repo-host
        parameters:
          content-target: true
    build-parameters:
      build-result: app/
      requires:
        - name: PostgreSQLdemoadminbooks
          artifacts:
            - admin-books.zip
          target-path: app/
        - name: PostgreSQLdemobrowse
          artifacts:
            - browse.zip
          target-path: app/

  - name: PostgreSQLdemoadminbooks
    type: html5
    path: app/admin-books
    build-parameters:
      build-result: dist
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npm run build
      supported-platforms:
        []
  - name: PostgreSQLdemobrowse
    type: html5
    path: app/browse
    build-parameters:
      build-result: dist
      builder: custom
      commands:
        - npm ci
        - npm run build
      supported-platforms:
        []

  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-portal-deployer
    type: com.sap.application.content
    path: app/portal
    requires:
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-portal
        parameters:
          content-target: true
          service-key:
            name: PostgreSQLdemo-portal-key
            config:
              content-endpoint: developer
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-auth
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-html5-repo-host
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-app-deployer
    deployed-after:
      - PostgreSQLdemo-app-deployer
  - name: notification-content-deployment
    type: nodejs
    path: gen/srv
    parameters:
      no-route: true
      no-start: true
      memory: 256MB
      disk-quota: 1GB
      tasks:
        - name: notification-content-deployment
          command: "node node_modules/@cap-js/notifications/lib/content-deployment.js"
          memory: 256MB
          disk-quota: 1GB
    requires:
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-destination
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-auth
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-connectivity
      - name: PostgreSQLdemo-messaging

resources:
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-auth
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: PostgreSQLdemo-${org}-${space}
        tenant-mode: dedicated
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-postgres
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: postgresql-db
      service-plan: development
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-messaging
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: enterprise-messaging
      service-plan: default
      path: ./event-mesh.json
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-connectivity
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: connectivity
      service-plan: lite
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite
      config:
        HTML5Runtime_enabled: true
        init_data:
          instance:
            existing_destinations_policy: update
            destinations:
              - Name: PostgreSQLdemo-srv-api
                URL: ~{srv-api/srv-url}
                Authentication: NoAuthentication
                Type: HTTP
                ProxyType: Internet
                HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: true
                HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
              - Name: ui5
                URL: https://ui5.sap.com
                Authentication: NoAuthentication
                Type: HTTP
                ProxyType: Internet

  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-html5-repo-host
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: html5-apps-repo
      service-plan: app-host
  - name: my-postgresql
    type: com.sap.xs.postgresql
    parameters:
      service-plan: hyperscaler
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-html5-runtime
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: html5-apps-repo
      service-plan: app-runtime
  - name: PostgreSQLdemo-portal
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service: portal
      service-plan: standard

and here is my package.json file

{
  "name": "PostgreSQLdemo",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@cap-js/notifications": "*",
    "@cap-js/postgres": "^1.10.4",
    "@sap/cds": "^8",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4",
    "express": "^4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/cds-types": "^0.7.0",
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^8"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve"
  },
  "sapux": [
    "app/admin-books",
    "app/browse"
  ],
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "mocked",
      "messaging": {
        "kind": "enterprise-messaging"
      },
      "db": {
        "kind": "postgres"
      },
      "connectivity": true,
      "destinations": true,
      "html5-repo": true,
      "portal": true
    }
  }
}

Please resolve this error

entry.title: Failed to load User Attributes in SAP Fiori App.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts !

We are facing an issue while fetching the login_name and groups property while reading user attributes in the Fiori app; the rest of the properties are coming as usual, like firstname, lastname, name, and email. We are expecting the login_name and groups property as well, because our main logic and manipulation of data is based on login_name and groups.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Guide to Consume RAP application to Fiori Using SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Thanks @arunkumarn1998 very well explained...

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Is RFC connection used in SAP Public Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi There,

 

I recommend you look at this information, so you can see how to integrate SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/e426646571fc456bb7ac51ea2b66add5.html?q=Analysis+for+Microsoft 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/sap-s-4hana-public-cloud-for-group-reporting-with-sap-analysis-for/ba-p/13533459

Hope this helps,

Marco

entry.title: Re: Managing manual tests with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: @TSTOFFELS We can't wait for the APIs for testing to arrive in CALM 🙂

entry.title: IPS: Email and Telephone Not Provisioned to Enable Now
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Why are the email and phone number attributes not being provisioned  to Enable Now using the default transformation code?

I am provisioning users with SAP IPS  from Azure to IAS and then to Enable Now.

Many Thanks

entry.title: Re: Recommendation-Assisted Sales Order Creation - Overview
entry.content: @dipper Is this also coming to S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition?

entry.title: Re: Collection of String in deep entity model
entry.content: rightnow i am using V1 But if i use V4 Kindly help me which method entity i use for deep_entity and how can I found my service in tcode /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE

entry.title: Re: Countdown Timer in Marketing Mail (SAP Marketing Cloud)
entry.content: Hi Joyca, I assume you are referring to the "new" editor, aren't you?

entry.title: Internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database [Microsoft] [ODBC Driver 17 for SQL
entry.content:
We receive the error "Internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database [Microsoft] [ODBC Driver 17 for SQL server] Communication Link failed"

This happening during loading  via DTP from a microsoft SQL server into SAP BW. We are using SAP HANA DATA SMART data Access. This is working fine but lately we quite often receive this error. So sometimes it is working fine but sometimes we receive the error.

What can we do ? So this error is not happening anymore ?

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!
entry.content:
Great content, never doubt the power of ABAP.

 

Kudos my friend 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Client 8.00
entry.content:
Hi Steffen, thanks, we are planning a revision of the history for the upcoming version 8.10. And we really appreciate your feedback!

Regards,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: REPLACE/TRANSLATE not working
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Did anyone found any solution to this issue. This issue is happening with me as well till now.

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!
entry.content: One quick note: if you rate "code pushdown" as "must have", which I find a bit too much since "should have" is more like it, then it should follow that "Eclipse" is also a "must have", which it is anyway 🙂

entry.title: Re: Absence Rate Calculations for Story Reports
entry.content: Hey - have you tried a cross tab table in the story report ? I have a cross tab that shows me the total amount of sick days taken and I have a start date filter and end date filter which I adjust as necessary.

entry.title: Re: SAP Rapid Deployment Solution SAP HANA Integrated Business Planning rapid-deployment solution V2
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Can please help on how to download RDS IBP? Please provide the steps to follow

entry.title: Re: Personas 3.0 SAP GUI and Scripting - Does not work af...
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply Tamas. I know SAP GUI Windows is not always running the same way.

I have made all the java scripting to take into consideration what does not work in SAP GUI Windows.
And everything worked on my laptop as well until the update. I have the same version when I log into Citrix and start SAP and this way everything works in SAP GUI Windows so I think it is strange why it does not work from my laptop. And as I mention. It has worked.

But I have asked the tech team to update the version to 800 PL10. If it still does not work then I will open a case for SAP as you are suggesting.

entry.title: Re: Making Script Objects as global
entry.content:
Not yet, as far as I am aware, in a straightforward manner. However, here are a few alternate approaches you might consider:

1. Copying Script Objects

If you have ODE Story scripts grouped under a common script object in a central story, you can copy the entire script object into another story. I currently do this by organising “helper scripts” under a single script object, which allows me to quickly paste them into a new story in one step. However, this approach does not support lifecycle management, as the scripts cannot be centrally updated.

2. Using Composites

Composites in SAC allow for central management of codebases and can be added to stories relatively easily. While Composites are typically used for visual content, they can also carry code, including properties, methods, functions, and events. The limitation here is that Composite scripts offer reduced library access and cannot directly interact with the host Story. For example, you cannot include a Planning model object in a Composite for dimension member lookups. However, you could package reusable logic like string conversion routines, date/time functions, etc., where you pass arguments and retrieve a result.

3. Using a Custom Widget

A custom widget can serve as a technical script host, allowing for full JavaScript access and enabling functionality that SAC does not natively support. For example, I previously used this approach in Lumira to implement array sorting and a bunch of other small stuff, which Lumira lacked. This method is best suited for standalone functions where you pass values and receive a return value. However, it is not useful for scripts requiring direct interaction with the host Story.

I hope these ideas help!

Cheers, Ivan

entry.title: Re: Disable linked Invoice and Credit memo clearing while...
entry.content:
Dear Crocha,

The invoice reference field shouldn't be displayed if the "use invoice reference" option is not checked.

If you want further investigation regarding this issue, please kindly create a support case in the component FI-FIO-AR-TRA-2CL. Please provide attachments with some practical examples, as well as all the steps you or specific users took. Also, please provide CB users in each example.

Best regards,
Gordon

entry.title: Re: Actual Rate Calculation - Event Based Posting
entry.content:
I got the answer, actually in sap standard activity type indicator 5 (automatic calculation of actual rate) was not set. Working fine after I made the changes

Thanks Owen

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!
entry.content: @abo Yes, it might be an exaggeration 😀. What I really meant to convey is that we can no longer have programs entirely developed in the application layer, consuming too much memory or facing performance issues.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Content Usage (Open Story) per month
entry.content:
The standard models are in the 'System' folder so not generally accessible unless an admin adjusts the sharing permissions.

You should find them at:

Files / System / Common / SAC Content / SAC Content Overview / SAC Content Overview - Models.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Error: Asset Value Date Cannot Be Later Than Transfer Date
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on uploading Fixed Asset Postings via the Migration Cockpit in SAP Public Cloud. During the upload, I encountered the following error:

Error Message: Asset value date (01.01.2024) cannot be later than transfer date (31.12.2023)
Message Class: AA
Message Number: 247

What surprises me is that a previous upload with the same date pattern was processed successfully without any issues.

Details of the Scenario:

In both uploads, the Asset Value Date is 01.01.2024 and the Transfer Date is 31.12.2023.
The system accepted the earlier upload but rejects this one, even though no configuration changes have been made in the interim.
Could anyone guide me on:

Why this inconsistency might be occurring?
Steps I can take to resolve or bypass this issue?

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help.

Best regards,

Muaaz

Satish

entry.title: Re: The 15 Most Important Topics for the ABAP Developer of the Future!

entry.title: How to add an extension field in extension scenario
entry.content:
Customer has created an extension field and want to know how to extend it to another work center / sales document.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add an extension field in extension scenario
entry.content:
Please follow below steps to extend the extension field:

 

  1. On the screen on which you created the extension field, enter adaptation mode by selecting Enter Adaptation Mode form the Adapt menu.
  2. Select Edit Screen from the Adapt menu.
  3. The adaptation panel opens on the right side of the screen.
  4. Under Extension Fields, select the extension field you created previously and scroll down until you can see the extension field details.
  5. Click the Further Usage link.
  6. On the Extension Scenarios tab of the Further Usage screen, you can see a list of all extension scenarios to which you can add this extension field.
  7. Click on the arrow icon next to the extension scenario name to view a list of data flows. Each data flow consists of a source and target business context. This reflects the direction in which data is passed from one business context to the next. An extension scenario can contain one or more data flows.
  8. Select the extension scenarios that you want to extend and click Add Field.
  9. The extension field is made available in all business contexts involved in the selected extension scenarios. This means that you can now add the extension field to all screens, form templates, data sources and reports that are based on these business contexts.
  10. To make the extension field visible on the screens that are part of each extension scenario, you must navigate to the screen, and select Enter Adaptation Mode from the Adapt menu.
  11. Select Edit Screen from the Adapt menu.
  12. Under Extension Fields, select the screen section on which you want the extension field to be visible and then select the Visible checkbox beside the extension field name.
  13. Save and publish your changes.

 

For more information please refer to the help document which provides brief explanation about extending the extension field https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2d8cdc29722d1014b876f1b250f32b7d.html

entry.title: SAP Fiori List Report - OData V4: List Not Refreshing automatically After Action (change)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

A few months ago, I built a Fiori List Report app for the SD module using OData V2 in an on-premise environment. The app had actions like "Remove Block," "Add Block," and "Add Comment," and it worked perfectly—after each action, the list report refreshed automatically and displayed the updated data.

Recently, I created a similar app as a Fiori List Report app, but this time using OData V4 in the same on-premise environment. Unfortunately, the actions no longer refresh the list report after submitting changes always I had to click "GO" in order to get it the list refreshed.

Steps Taken to Identify the Issue:

  1. Adjusted the UI5 Version to both newer and older versions.
  2. Implemented side effects using guided development tools.
  3. Compared the manifest.json, metadata.XML and other app components between the old (OData V2) and new (OData V4) apps and found significant differences.

Despite thorough testing and troubleshooting, I couldn’t resolve the issue.

Request:

Could someone guide me on how to ensure the list report refreshes properly after an action in a Fiori List Report app using OData V4?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Attached are the old and the new manifest

entry.title: "Reason" field in the "Reason for movement" cutomizing point
entry.content:
Hello SAP community!

I have to do the following customizing point for my client: SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Movement Types -> Record Reason for Goods Movements.

But I don't understand what the purpose of the "Reason" field is (only numbers it seems), because there is already a "Reason for Movement" field where I can define my reason with text.

I see in the standard proposition that sometimes Reason 1 corresponds to "Poor quality" (e.g., Movement 123) and other times Reason 1 corresponds to "Quality issues" (e.g., Movement 823).

Does a link between these two fields exist, and how can I decide for a new "Reason for movement type" which "Reason" I have to put?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: LMS Calendar invites

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Overview of tools for maintaining custom launchpad content and layou
entry.content:
Summary of my comment
I would like to be able to test any change in business catalogs on another client before releasing the transport. But I have difficulties with that.

Our situation
We have an environment where the DEV system is settled with two major clients (client 100 and client 110). Our procedure is to develop on the 100-client and to release the transports targeting the ACC system. When customization needs to be copied to client 110, we do that using the SCC1N. 

I am using tcode /n/ui2/flpcm_cust to assign a Tile and TM to a business catalog. This leads to a transport, containing a customizing task, containing objects of type 'customizing: table content'. 

When I release the transport, the content is available to be imported in the ACC env; But the content is not automatically transported to client 110. 

The challenge we have encountered is fed by the following limitations and restrictions: 

  • Using SCC1N we are not able to transport this content of a table. SCC1 does not copy the contents of a table - SAP Community
  • Using /n/ui2/FLPCM_CONF is not the recommended approach of changing custom business catalogs. SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Overview of tools for ... - SAP Community

That means, following the recommended approach, we have to: 

  • Release the transport
  • Import the transport into the client 110 using STMS

I am not feeling comfortable with that for the following two reasons: 

  • Releasing the transport leads in our case to an automatic import into our ACC-environment, while I have in mind that I want to have one business catalog for testing purpose sitting on the DEV environment. I prefer to have it in my case of today to be a local transport. Or, in more common cases, I want to be able to test it on the DEV client 110 before releasing it.
  • This also means that we have to implement a manual step in the organization after each change of business catalog. 

What I do not want as a solution. 

  • Our architect and internal IT supplier do not want to have the client 110 in the transport lane.
  • I do not want to develop directly on client 110 because we do all developments on 100 and I want our processes to be understandable and simple for newcomers and consultants by following the SAP standards as much as possible. 

What solution am I considering:

  • As a workaround, I am considering the implement BaDi CTS_REQUEST_CHECK to trigger a workflow when a transport is released carrying this specific FLPCM content. This workflow will raise a popup recommending importing the transport using STMS on client 110. Also this workflow will trigger a human action in the organization to validate if this action has been done. 

So Why do I submit this purposal to SAP. 
We have been using FLPD_CUST in the past and now I want us to use FLPCM_CUST. There are a lot of benefits; Like for example... this new tooling helps us to avoid making a mess. I am using FLPCM_CUST for a while now, and I feel very comfortable with it. I want to encourage my colleagues and future colleagues to use it to profit from all technical and functional benefits. But this missing piece that I have found, is very unfortunate. I would like to suggest the feature to be able to test any change in business catalogs on another client before releasing the transport. 

Questions and additional info: 
I have two questions. 

  • Am I missing something that might help me?
  • Would it be appreciated if I commit this suggestion to into SAP's Customer Influence and Adoption program, should I open a SAP Case, or is this not appropriated for this case (and if not, why not)? 

Additional info:

  • Our authorization consultant makes changes on the 100, but he and the whole team tests their own work on 110 before releasing it. This implies my case is differs from Micheals case.

Thanks in advance

Vladimir

entry.title: Damaged label in warehouse and need to print one single product label

entry.title: Migrating Classic Workflows from ECC to Flexible Workflow in S/4HANA

Are there any best practices, challenges, or specific considerations I should be aware of during this process? I’d greatly appreciate any information, guidance, or links to resources that can help me better understand and approach this migration.

Any help would be gladly appreciated, 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: End-To-End Creation of View Cluster
entry.content:
Hi Ranjitha,

Thanks for posting!

entry.title: Re: controller and firefighter cannot be the same person
entry.content:
Hello Srinivasa, I guess it would be fine to get familiar with the four eyes principle because this is the approach and the purpose of SAP GRC (as the tool for Segregation of Duties). For SAP Security related SAP Role Management and User Management it's obviously clear that Role Administrator can create and change roles but can not be allowed to assign roles to users, and that User Administrator can create users but can not be allowed to give access rights to users, it's analogy of SOX but for IT.

SAP GRC is able to help to cover critical points of business related processes and also IT related processes. Even if usewd mainly, Emergency Access Management is only a part of SAP GRC complexity.

Have a nice day.

Br

entry.title: Re: SAP 分析云 2024 年第四季度更新介绍
entry.content:
根据我了解的情况， 只有国内客户的office 365 是部署微软位于国内的数据中心‘世纪互联’时才需要手工操作 ，正常的Azure 部署的都不需要手动操作。 SAC add-in 跟SAC一样都是自动更新的， 但是周期不同，add-in 目前是每月一更新。

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_OFFICE/ccbf41c7f6ff49caa7af5b4b8c2312e7/6f66fdf47b124b6aa3f86d93bb28dea6.html

entry.title: Select historical date range in a story
entry.content:
Hi

Just wondering if there is a way of selecting an historical date range in a story? You seem to only be able to select a range for so many days/months back to days/months forward. What if it’s November and I want to select a Date Completed range from September to October. Is that not possible?

I know stories are supposed to be a snapshot in time as of now but stories are supposed to be replacing canvas reports so stories should have some functionality similar to canvas. Because of the limit of 1 million cells in a story, you may have to select a small date range so you can export the data, and then select another small date range and export that. I know we are to discourage data export but some processes require it and if we can’t do it, it’s going to cause real issues.

If you respond please don’t insert a link to a knowledge base article because I can’t see them.

Thanks

does anybody know the speed of the VPN connection within SAP DC (ROT) when ordering RISE BASE Option. There are no infos in any PCA slides or sheets. For Azure it is 650Mbit/s, but there are no details for SAPDC. Can anybody provide info?

entry.title: Migrating from CR9 nowadays
entry.content:
Hello

I am looking for a solution to the following situation:

Quite a few years ago I developed a VB.NET project (Windows desktop application) using the Visual Studio 2005. As a reporting tool I used Crystal Reports 9. The project was designed to load the CR9 reports from an external folder and worked very well.
A year ago, I migrated succesfully this project using the Visual Studio 2022 without changing the way CR9 are loaded. In order to make the old reports run, I found in the Internet the CRRedist2005_X64.msi and CRRedist2005_X86.msi. After running them in the target machine the old reports displayed normally.
This is the story up to now. I know what you may think: this is not the normal developer's way in the year 2024. OK I agree.
Well here is my real question as I do not want:
a) to import and embed these reports into the VB.NET 2022 application for various reasons
b) neither I want to redesign them as they are many

According to your experience what would be the best way and route to go out of this situation?
Thanks a lot
Panagiotis Adam

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing BTP - SD integration
entry.content: The first part was solved as well. I have created the three conditions as discounts, maintained them acording to sap.help acrticle, put them at the place where you normally put discounts in the pricing procedure. Then the important part of the pricing procedure setting are the routines. One of them is actually calling the servise on BTP side and use the call result as discount value.

{   "code": "invalidFilter",
    "message": "Invalid filter for the view passed. Unsupported filters passed :{updatedDateFrom=2023-01-06T21:40:14Z, updatedDateTo=2023-08-06T21:40:14Z}" }

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer News, November 21st 2024

entry.title: Re: Alternative for _SYS_BI_CP_ALL Analytical Privilege in HANA cloud?
entry.content: Correct me if I am wrong but the HANA cloud default to SQL AP's and not classic? So this behavior is expected and each view thats being created will auto have the SQL on it...if enabled. BW has a nice replication program that auto(magically) replicates the BW object to a view in HANA and assigns the AP to a HANA role, you should then be able to use this with your containers with some clever config on the security side.

entry.title: Re: Transfer parameters of a custom operation or custom hook in SAP Landscape Management (LaMa)
entry.content:
Hi,

I have some secure custom properties defined in LaMa under "Configuration Extensions -> Custom Properties" that I want to pass to my scripts.

Checking with the documentation I should use the LVM_SEC_PARAMS and retrieve the custom property I want from it in my script. This is my conf file line to pass it:

Command: <path of the script> $[LVM_SEC_PARAMS]

But it doesn't send anything. Any idea if I'm doing something wrong here ? Not much info or examples on the subject anywhere.

entry.title: Settlement does not recognize Downpayment of the previous year
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

I am trying to settle a WBS element to Asset in 11.2024. The following Error is triggered:

Check amount entered (Amount is too high).

The retirement amount entered is higher than the sum of the transactions changing the acquisition value in area .Taking into account the entered asset value date and the posting period, the maximum retirement amount is .

My AUC Asset (wbs settlement rule has AUC and Asset) has a Downpayment posting in 2023 that has been cleared in 2024. Anyway the system is not considering the postings before 2024 and it allows to settle only what is posted on AUC in 2024.  I understand that is the standard SAP behavior.

Is there any valid workaround that could allow me to settle the entire amount.

Thanks in advance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Compatibility of SAP ECC version 6 EHP 5 with SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Re: SAC live BW Query variable not applying from URL
entry.content: Hi Lothar, do you think that is possible to avoid the Prompt variable in SAC? Even with a option variable and when you fill out the values via parameter in URL the prompt variable appears.

entry.title: Re: How to decode STXL table without SE37 or SE38 transac...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is not possible to view the CLUSTD field directly as a table in SAP, because the STXL- CLUSTD field is a compressed data set and is stored in raw format in the database. SAP is designed to decipher this type of data only through specific business logic. However, there are several alternative ways to access this data and view its raw format.

Using the READ_TEXT function module, you can create a text in SAP table format and manipulate this table as you wish

entry.title: Re: Integration of pegging relationship between AATP and...
entry.content:
Hello,

The transferring of pegging result from SAP IBP to S4 or ECC should be a known solution by now based on the date of the post.

I had done the solution in SDI, but the architecture should be relevant for RTI as well.

In SAP IBP, in order to transfer the pegged result you have to run the job "Data Integration: Extraction of Order-Based Planning Result". The data gets stored in 5 tables. Check this link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/7cc6c35770994957ade465f87ac9c3d4/af0af4cee4964dd6924494ac061ecff2.html?q=pegging%2520result.

For these data to be transferred to S4, ECC or any ERP tool a certain set of configuration has to be done:

1. DP Agent has to be installed. Note: for integration through SDI, you can install 2 DP Agents in one server. One for Inbound eg. Abap Adaptor and another for Outbound eg. File Adapter.

2. Pegging results are always transferred through File Adapter and store the result in a .csv file. 5 files which are basically the tables mentioned in the link provided. Check Note: 2479514 - Sample .csv and .cfg files for IBP RM SDI integration

3. Now, you need to transfer those files using a shell script to S4, ECC or ERP system in custom tables. And also the shell script should delete the existing entries in those 5 files, so that for the next time it can re-populate the new pegging results in the .csv files. 

Well, now you have all the pegging results in custom table, you are good to make your own reports or customizations to carry out your business requirements. 

Note:

1. The only catch in the whole puzzle is installing 2 DP Agents in the server. This information was provided by SAP during our project, it is not documented in a simple way in sap help.

2. For RTI, I think one DP Agent should do the wonders.

 

Kind regards

Alok

entry.title: Datasphere Replication flow - Delta load of LO or SAPI extractor from ECC
entry.content:
Dear Datasphere Experts,

This pertains to the extraction of LO extractors (2LIS*) from ECC to a third-party target, such as AWS, using a "replication flow" facilitated by premium outbound connectivity.

According to SAP documentation, only an initial load is supported when the source object lacks a primary key for ODP artifacts.

Reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/2267a9f6a5724ec0ae5632db4f9f70e5.html

Here are my questions:

  1. What are the possible workarounds for this limitation, considering LO extractors (2LIS*) are widely used across organizations, and delta functionality is essential?
  2. Is there a plan in SAP's roadmap (I couldn’t locate one) to provide delta functionality for all standard and custom extractions without primary key?

This is a common requirement as It work perfectly in SAP BW, and I believe it warrants attention. I would appreciate your guidance.

BR,

Yatendra

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation of Transfer Order when a delivery is created
entry.content: Thanks a lot, Jack. It worked perfectly for me here.

entry.title: Clarifications Regarding SAP Disclosure Management Migration to SAP IaaS under RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have a customer planning to migrate to RISE with SAP who is currently running the SAP Disclosure Management solution on-premise. As part of our architecture design, we are considering moving this solution to an SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud). However, we have a few questions that require your clarification:

1.Storage Availability

Based on the SAP Description Guide, we understand that memory is available in configurations of 32 GiB, 64 GiB, and 128 GiB. Could you please clarify the storage capacity options available for SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud) so we can ensure alignment with the customer’s requirements?

2.Migration Responsibilities and Procedures

If the SAP Disclosure Management solution is moved from on-premise to the SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud):

•Are there any specific protocols or procedures to follow during the migration?

•Is the Partner fully responsible for operational services, including application installation and database management on the IaaS Server?

•Does the Partner have full administrative rights on this server?

 

Your guidance on the above points will greatly assist us in providing a seamless transition for our customer to the RISE with SAP environment.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition RISE with SAP 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your response.
